raw_consumer_statement:
I order - from Home Depot online - {$290.00} worth of baseboard. 

The delivery charge was {$35.00} Order was canceled within a short amount of time because local store did not have what I ordered. 

However, when called - I was told it would take up to 5 DAYS for refund to show up.

that is ridiculous this is HOME DEPOT. 

Think how much $ in interest they make off of these types of transactions!!! 

My credit card company said transaction was pending so I couldn't cancel it until there was a dispute.
